name: avalanche-mcp
description: Unified MCP server for Avalanche docs, CLI/RPC/ACP lookup, code search, blockchain & P-Chain lookups, indexed Data/Stats API reads, L1/ICTT build plans, and Builder Console guidance.

tools.name: docs_search
tools.description: Search body-level chunks across Avalanche docs, academy, integrations, and blog posts with citations and matching excerpts.

tools.name: docs_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a specific documentation page as markdown by internal URL path.

tools.name: docs_list_sections
tools.description: List available documentation sections and page counts.

tools.name: cli_lookup_command
tools.description: Search Avalanche CLI, Platform CLI, and tmpnet docs for commands, flags, and task guidance.

tools.name: rpc_lookup_method
tools.description: Search Avalanche RPC method docs across C-Chain, P-Chain, X-Chain, Subnet-EVM, and node APIs.

tools.name: acp_lookup
tools.description: Search Avalanche Community Proposals by number, title, or topic.

tools.name: acp_list
tools.description: List Avalanche Community Proposals with structured fields and optional status or track filters.

tools.name: avalanche_docs_search
tools.description: Compatibility alias for docs_search.

tools.name: avalanche_docs_fetch
tools.description: Compatibility alias for docs_fetch.

tools.name: avalanche_docs_list_sections
tools.description: Compatibility alias for docs_list_sections.

tools.name: github_search_code
tools.description: Search code across core Avalanche repositories.

tools.name: github_get_file
tools.description: Fetch a file from an allowed Avalanche GitHub repository.

tools.name: github_list_repositories
tools.description: List GitHub repositories covered by the MCP GitHub tools.

tools.name: blockchain_get_native_balance
tools.description: Get native AVAX balance for an EVM address.

tools.name: blockchain_get_contract_info
tools.description: Inspect whether an EVM address is a contract and identify common token metadata.

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_transaction
tools.description: Look up Avalanche transactions and parse common P-Chain/X-Chain transaction types.

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_address
tools.description: Look up EVM or P-Chain address details.

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_subnet
tools.description: Look up subnet details.

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_chain
tools.description: Look up blockchain details.

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_validator
tools.description: Look up validator details.

tools.name: platform_get_height
tools.description: Get the current P-Chain block height.

tools.name: platform_get_block
tools.description: Get a P-Chain block by block ID.

tools.name: platform_get_block_by_height
tools.description: Get a P-Chain block by height.

tools.name: platform_get_blockchains
tools.description: Get blockchains registered on the P-Chain.

tools.name: platform_get_subnets
tools.description: Get subnet information.

tools.name: platform_get_current_validators
tools.description: Get current validators for the Primary Network or a subnet.

tools.name: platform_get_pending_validators
tools.description: Get pending validators for the Primary Network or a subnet.

tools.name: platform_get_staking_asset_id
tools.description: Get the staking asset ID for a subnet.

tools.name: platform_get_min_stake
tools.description: Get minimum validator and delegator stake amounts.

tools.name: platform_get_total_stake
tools.description: Get total stake on a subnet.

tools.name: platform_get_balance
tools.description: Get P-Chain address balances.

tools.name: platform_get_utxos
tools.description: Get P-Chain UTXOs.

tools.name: platform_get_tx
tools.description: Get a P-Chain transaction.

tools.name: platform_get_tx_status
tools.description: Get P-Chain transaction status.

tools.name: platform_get_current_supply
tools.description: Get current AVAX supply from the P-Chain.

tools.name: platform_get_validators_at
tools.description: Get validators at a historical P-Chain height.

tools.name: info_get_node_version
tools.description: Get Avalanche node version and compatibility information.

tools.name: info_get_network_id
tools.description: Get the numeric Avalanche network ID.

tools.name: info_get_network_name
tools.description: Get the Avalanche network name.

tools.name: info_get_blockchain_id
tools.description: Resolve a blockchain alias to a blockchain ID.

tools.name: info_is_bootstrapped
tools.description: Check whether a chain is bootstrapped.

tools.name: info_get_tx_fee
tools.description: Get current Avalanche transaction fees.

tools.name: info_peers
tools.description: List node peers.

tools.name: info_acps
tools.description: Get live ACP voting/status information from the Info API.

tools.name: data_get_address_balances
tools.description: Indexed native + ERC-20 balances for an address via the Data API (no RPC rate limits).

tools.name: data_list_transactions
tools.description: List recent transactions for an address via the indexed Data API (paginated).

tools.name: data_list_transfers
tools.description: List ERC-20 token transfers for an address via the indexed Data API (paginated).

tools.name: data_list_blockchains
tools.description: List blockchains/subnets via the Data API (paginated; avoids the RPC getBlockchains overflow).

tools.name: data_lookup_subnet
tools.description: Rich subnet metadata via the Data API — blockchains, validator count, configuration.

tools.name: data_lookup_validator
tools.description: Validator details via the Data API — stake, uptime, delegations.

tools.name: stats_chain_metrics
tools.description: Time-series chain metrics via the Metrics/Stats API (txCount, activeAddresses, gasUsed, feesPaid).

tools.name: stats_network_metrics
tools.description: Network-wide time-series metrics via the Metrics/Stats API (validatorCount, delegatorCount, weights).

tools.name: l1_build_plan
tools.description: Generate an L1-creation plan — Builder Console (Quick Build) deep-link plus the equivalent platform-cli sequence.

tools.name: ictt_build_plan
tools.description: Generate an Interchain Token Transfer (ICTT) bridging plan — console deep-link plus @avalanche-sdk/interchain steps.

tools.name: validator_manager_plan
tools.description: Generate validator-manager (PoA/PoS) deployment and initialization steps.

tools.name: faucet_link
tools.description: Return the Builder Console faucet link for funding a Fuji testnet address.

tools.name: console_deep_link
tools.description: Deep-link into a specific Builder Console flow (create-l1, convert-to-l1, validator-manager, ictt, faucet, multisig).

tools.name: console_list_flows
tools.description: List the Builder Console flows the MCP knows, with summaries and deep-links.

tools.name: console_explain_flow
tools.description: Explain a Builder Console flow — steps, equivalent CLI, whether it signs, and a deep-link.

resources.name: Documentation Index
resources.description: Index of all Avalanche documentation pages

resources.name: Academy Index
resources.description: Index of all Avalanche Academy courses

resources.name: Blog Index
resources.description: Index of all Avalanche Builders Hub blog posts

resources.name: RPC Documentation Index
resources.description: Index of Avalanche RPC method and API documentation

resources.name: CLI Documentation Index
resources.description: Index of Avalanche CLI, Platform CLI, and tmpnet documentation

resources.name: ACP Index
resources.description: Index of Avalanche Community Proposal documentation
